comment: Canonical routing cases for FastAPI + React harness.

_notLiveRouted._comment: Skills intentionally not covered by a live routing case: they force-fire from CLAUDE.md P3.4 on a code-change condition, or trigger on a conversational state, not on description match. Coverage of the description-routed skills is asserted by tests/simulate-prompts.sh.

skills.accessibility: force-fired on any UI markup change (P3.4)
skills.rlm-explore: triggered by large/unfamiliar context, not a task prompt
skills.cross-repo-workspace: triggered by a multi-repo session, not a task prompt
skills.pushback-templates: triggered when about to push back on the user, not a task prompt
skills.vite: build-tool config skill, loaded on demand within frontend work

cases.prompt: Add a new React Router client route in apps/web that is protected by the existing frontend guard, fetches user profile data, and shows a loading state; no FastAPI or OpenAPI changes
variants: Create a guarded client route in apps/web that loads the user's profile and renders a spinner while the data is fetching

cases.prompt: Add a new signup form with email validation and async submit error handling
variants: Build a registration form with Zod email validation that surfaces submit errors to the user

cases.prompt: Investigate why this component rerenders on every keystroke and reduce the rerender cost
Add a confirmation dialog with keyboard navigation and focus management
Render user-submitted markdown safely without enabling raw HTML injection
Write a Vitest test for this component using Testing Library queries
Write a Playwright test that walks the login flow including OAuth redirect handling
Add a public FastAPI APIRouter endpoint for /status with a response model
Add a FastAPI dependency that resolves the current user and enforces an admin scope
Write pytest coverage for this FastAPI route using dependency overrides for the current user
Implement a new internal billing module with services, domain rules, and SQLAlchemy repository adapters; no public API schema or ADR is in scope
Change the FastAPI response schema and regenerate the TypeScript client consumed by React
Review this Python service for typing, Ruff issues, async boundaries, and pytest-friendly design

Refactor this Python service: replace the growing if/elif type ladder with a strategy, inject the clock and repository as Protocol ports instead of constructing them inside, and favor composition over the deep inheritance chain

This async function calls a blocking requests call and an unbounded asyncio.gather inside the event loop; rework it with TaskGroup, a Semaphore, asyncio.timeout, and run_in_executor for the blocking call
Audit this FastAPI JWT and cookie auth flow for CORS, CSRF, RBAC, and secret logging
Implement order checkout: insert the order row and decrement stock across two tables atomically
variants: Insert an order and its line items together so a failure rolls back both

cases.prompt: Delete inactive sessions from the database
This test is failing intermittently in CI — investigate the root cause
Plan a refactor that splits the chat feature into three smaller modules
We need to decide between cookie sessions and bearer tokens for the FastAPI API; document the rationale
Refactor this Promise.all to allow partial failures using Promise.allSettled with AbortSignal
Flatten the nested conditionals in this function using guard clauses and early returns
Optimize this hot loop for large datasets and high-frequency events
Simplify the code I just modified for clarity and consistency, preserving behavior
Review the skill library quality and check for misfiring or overlapping skills
Commit the changes and open a pull request against main
Set up CI and pre-commit hooks for backend pytest/Ruff/typecheck, frontend build/tests, and generated-client drift
What does this error mean: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined?
Translate this code comment to English: // calcula el total
What is dependency injection conceptually?
Build a streaming chat UI in React that renders assistant tokens as they arrive and shows a typing indicator
Extract this duplicated fetch-and-subscribe logic into a reusable custom hook and a compound component
Add a shadcn dialog and dropdown-menu to the settings page and compose them with existing components
Configure Tailwind v4 theme tokens and dark mode for the shadcn component library
Write a generic typed API client wrapper using conditional and mapped types to derive response shapes
Scaffold a new React project on the modern 2026 stack — framework, routing, data layer, and build tool
Write the design docs and SPEC for this medium cross-tier feature and get them design-reviewed before we plan tasks or write any code
Execute this approved implementation plan task by task
Review whether the completed work matches the design docs and acceptance criteria
Use the fullstack implementation recipe to orchestrate this feature end to end: requirements, layer design docs, design-sync, plan, then build across the FastAPI API and the React UI
Use a structured diagnosis recipe to reproduce, isolate, and root-cause this flaky endpoint before any fix, then route to the right fix recipe
Generate architecture and SPEC documentation for this undocumented legacy module straight from its code
Add a high-value end-to-end integration test that proves the checkout flow works against the API
